productDisplayName: Crusoe Men Small Biker Brown Brief
description: Composition A relaxed Fit brief made of 95% combed cotton and 5% lycra preshrunk fabric, has strong, flexible elastic on the waistband, reinforced seams and printed label on the inner Fit Mid rise Wash care Wash at 40 degrees using a mild detergent Tumble dry low Do not bleach Dry in shade Cool iron This mid-rise Edge small biker brief from crusoe is crafted using a soft absorbent cotton/lycra blend that lets the fabric contour your hips and allows you to stretch with ease. The printed label on the inner allows abrasion-free comfort while the superior stretch elastic is perfect for better leg movement. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model with waist 34" and hips 38"
